name: Voidbreaker — Reimagine Asteroids as a Complete Arcade Game
summary: Turn the 2010 asteroid engine demo into a complete, addictive modern arcade game — not a faithful port. Use the original assets and feel as a springboard, then invent the systems that make players chase one more run.

source.description: A 2010 C++/OpenGL asteroid demo and its 2D engine. The demo is a thin tech sample (ship, asteroids, shooting, explosions, audio) — not a finished product. Assets under Resources/ (ship, asteroids, plasma, explosions, backgrounds, SFX, music) are the visual/audio DNA to reuse or reinterpret.
